outcome_record.event_name: Bundesliga Round 26 — Borussia Dortmund vs Bayer Leverkusen

prediction.pre_match_note: Bundesliga R26. BVB vs Leverkusen — Gelbe Wand crowd atmosphere. BVB home record (Signal Street Parade culture). CL quarter-final place in play for both. Leverkusen chasing second Bundesliga title. High stakes both sides.

calibration_flags.notes: WRONG DIRECTION — Draw when near-equal high stakes. Both teams highly motivated (CL spot + title chase). When two high-motivation elite teams meet in a high-stakes match, draw premium increases significantly. This is similar to derby compression but for non-derby high-stakes matches. Consider high-stakes symmetry → expanded draw probability.
